commands.review_summary:
The PR updates gateway child-session candidate handling, Talk launch-option tests, and Copilot/GitHub Copilot compatibility test/type surfaces to repair current main checks.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +4. Total +10 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the pinned SDK types expose `baseDirectory` and `Date`, while the PR changes the runtime/test path to `copilotHome` and `0`. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair worker can restore the pinned Copilot SDK contract, resolve the one current-main test conflict, and rerun the focused validation without a product decision.

target.title: fix(ci): repair current main checks
target.body:
## Summary

- tolerates missing session-store maps while building single-row child-session candidate indexes
- prevents `chat.history` / session-info paths from throwing when a caller has no loaded store but still asks for child-session metadata
- updates the stale Talk launch-options UI test to exercise the current custom Talk select controls instead of removed native `<select>` controls
- keeps latest `main`'s lightweight session-row context-token behavior unchanged

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts --reporter=verbose -t "renders editable Talk launch options"`: passed 1 targeted test
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts --reporter=dot`: passed 1 shard / 71 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=verbose`: passed 1 shard / 122 tests before the UI test commit on this branch
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/session-utils.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`: passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json src/gateway/session-utils.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`: passed
- `git diff --check` and `git diff --check --cached`: passed
- touched-file private-name scrub returned no reported private plugin/tool names
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- Blacksmith Testbox attempt was blocked by missing local auth: `blacksmith auth login` required
- AWS Crabbox: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label main-ci-blocker-check-changed --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` (`provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_d06066b0821a`, `run=run_5910a706ae5f`, exit 0)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: the gateway no longer throws `Cannot convert undefined or null to object` while building single-row child-session candidates for session-info paths that do not have a loaded store, and the current Talk launch-options UI test no longer blocks CI by querying obsolete native select markup.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree `fix-main-ci-blockers-20260601` rebased onto current `origin/main`, plus remote AWS Crabbox `cbx_d06066b0821a`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reran the focused gateway chat directive-tags and session search regressions, the targeted Talk launch-options repro, the full chat view test file, formatter, lint, diff check, private-name scrub, structured autoreview, and remote `pnpm check:changed`.

Evidence after fix: the focused gateway tests passed 122 tests; the chat view shard passed 71 tests including the previously failing Talk launch-options test; AWS Crabbox changed gate selected `core` and `coreTests` and exited 0.

Observed result after fix: missing stores produce an empty child-session candidate map instead of throwing, valid store callers keep the same candidate and context-token behavior, and the Talk launch-options test now exercises the shipped custom select controls.

What was not tested: full repository suite.
target.author: vincentkoc
